title: AI Agents Engineering Bootcamp
subtitle: 8-Week Production AI Agents Journey
description: Learn to build, orchestrate, and deploy autonomous AI agents. Move beyond simple chatbots to multi-agent systems and stateful AI workflows using LangGraph and LangChain.

projects.title: Autonomous Research Agent
projects.description: Design an agent system for automated web research and reporting.

projects.title: Multi-Agent System
projects.description: Orchestrate multiple agents using CrewAI or AutoGen.

projects.title: PDF Knowledge RAG
projects.description: Build a state-of-the-art RAG system with complex retrieval.

curriculum.title: Foundations of AI Agents

lessons.title: AI agents vs LLM apps, real-world use cases, and agent architecture basics
Reason-act-observe loops, tools, APIs, and system design essentials

curriculum.practice: Build a basic AI assistant using an LLM API
curriculum.outcome: Students understand agent architecture and build a first working agent.

curriculum.title: Prompt Engineering and Control

lessons.title: Chain-of-thought, ReAct, few-shot prompting, and system prompt design
Tool calling, structured outputs, prompt debugging, and optimization

curriculum.practice: Build a reasoning-based agent with tool usage
curriculum.outcome: Students control LLM behavior more reliably and intelligently.

curriculum.title: LangChain and Tool-Based Agents

lessons.title: Chains, tools, memory, execution flow, and decision-making patterns
Multi-tool agents with search, calculator, and API integrations

curriculum.outcome: Students build modular agents using tools and memory.

curriculum.title: RAG Systems

lessons.title: Embeddings, vector databases, chunking strategies, and document retrieval

curriculum.outcome: Students create knowledge-based AI systems for real applications.

curriculum.title: LangGraph Workflows

lessons.title: State machines, planner-executor flows, and looping agent workflows
Fallbacks, error handling, and structured multi-step design

curriculum.outcome: Students design reliable multi-step AI workflows.

curriculum.title: Multi-Agent Systems

lessons.title: AutoGen, CrewAI, collaboration patterns, and agent communication
Task delegation, role-based agents, and system scaling concepts

curriculum.outcome: Students build collaborative AI systems with multiple agents.

curriculum.title: Production AI Systems

lessons.title: Deployment with Streamlit/FastAPI, logging, monitoring, and observability
Cost optimization, retries, guardrails, and safety handling

curriculum.practice: Deploy an AI agent web app with logging

curriculum.title: Evaluation and Capstone

lessons.title: Evaluation, debugging, tracing, benchmarking, and optimization workflows
Final capstone: full AI agent system with deployment and testing

curriculum.outcome: Students complete a portfolio-ready AI system.

features: Design and deploy autonomous AI agents using LangChain & RAG
Multi-agent orchestration with CrewAI or AutoGen
